initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Patient.Birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', Patient.Birthday)) AS Age, Examination.Diagnosis
FROM Examination
JOIN Patient ON Examination.ID = Patient.ID
JOIN Laboratory ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
ORDER BY Laboratory.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Patient.Birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', Patient.Birthday)) AS Age, Examination.Diagnosis
FROM Patient
JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
ORDER BY Laboratory.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT julianday('now') - julianday(p.Birthday) AS age, e.Diagnosis
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON l.ID = p.ID
ORDER BY l.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) AS age, e.Diagnosis
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
ORDER BY l.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Patient.Birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', Patient.Birthday)) AS Age, Examination.Diagnosis
FROM Patient
JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
ORDER BY Laboratory.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Patient.Birthday) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', Patient.Birthday)) AS Age, Examination.Diagnosis
FROM Patient
JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
ORDER BY Laboratory.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

candidates.sql:
SELECT CAST((julianday('now') - julianday(Patient.Birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS Age, Examination.Diagnosis
FROM Patient
JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
ORDER BY Laboratory.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Patient.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', Patient.Birthday)) AS Age, Examination.Diagnosis
FROM Patient
JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE Laboratory.HGB = (
    SELECT MAX(Laboratory.HGB)
    FROM Laboratory
)
LIMIT 1;

SELECT CAST((julianday('now') - julianday(p.Birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS age, e.Diagnosis
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.HGB = (SELECT MAX(HGB) FROM Laboratory)
LIMIT 1;
